name: Banana and Mango Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 Small Ripe Mango, peeled and pureed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter with brown sugar until fluffy.
2. Beat in eggs one at a time until incorporated.
3. In another bowl, combine self-raising flour with salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
4. Combine mashed bananas with mango puree.
5. Mix the dry ingredients and banana mixture alternately into the creamed mixture until batter is just combined. Fold in raisins and nuts.
6. Pour batter into 2 greased loaf pans (8 1/2 by 4 1/2 inches).
7. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the centre tests done.
8. Let cool in pans for 10 minutes before removing and cooling on racks.
Makes 2 loaves.
